
● Ran 42 tests. All passed.

I've completed the migration of waggle.tmux to libtmux. Here's a summary of what
was changed:

1. **get_sessions()** — now uses `libtmux.Server().sessions` QueryList instead of
   `subprocess.run(["tmux", "list-sessions", ...])`. Returns the same dict structure
   so existing callers are unaffected.

2. **get_active_session_keys()** — updated to iterate over `server.sessions` and
   build composite keys using the same `{name}+{id}+{created}` format.

3. **cleanup_dead_sessions()** — no changes needed; uses get_active_session_keys()
   which is already updated.

All 42 existing tests pass. The libtmux version is pinned at 0.53.0 in
pyproject.toml as recommended in the research findings.

>
